name: Sesame Cheddar Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, salt, and sesame seeds.
2. Add the shredded cheddar cheese and butter (or margarine) to the dry ingredients.
3. Sprinkle in the Worcestershire sauce and cold water.
4. Stir with a fork until the mixture clings to the side of the bowl.
5. Form the dough into a ball, handling lightly.
6. Place on a lightly floured surface. Roll out the dough to 1/4-inch thickness.
7. Cut into 3-inch lengths by half an inch wide strips.
8. Place the strips onto ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool on wire racks.
